name: mmm-simpleremote
description: Simple remote dashboard for MagicMirror (alerts + config patching)

scripts.check: node --check MMM-SimpleRemote.js && node --check node_helper.js && node --check lib/HueBridge.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/config.js && node --check public/dashboard.js && node --check public/login.js && node --check public/setup.js
